feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Oportunidades de Ventas
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

Necesito impedir que los usuarios eliminen las oportunidades de venta, excepto la gerente de ventas, intento hacerlo por transaction pero a la hora de intentar eliminar trae null el valor del OpprId.

Este es mi código:

IF :object_type = '97' AND :transaction_type = 'D' THEN

DECLARE usr nvarchar(10);
SELECT T0."U_USER" INTO usr FROM OOPR T0 WHERE T0."OpprId" = :list_of_cols_val_tab_del ;
IF :usr <> 21 THEN
error := 92;
error_message := 'TN-92: Este usuario no está autorizado para eliminar oportunidades de ventas.';
END IF

END IF

ese parametro :list_of_cols_val_tab_del no recupera el valor del formulario actual a la hora de dispararse la TN

Si alguien tiene este mismo caso, sería de mucha ayuda . Mi versión de SAP B1 es la 9.3 PL14

Saludos.

entry.title: HANA failed to start after updating to SLES 15 SP6 from SLES 15 SP5
entry.content:
HANA DB was working fine until I updated my SLES 15 from SP5 to SP6. This is on ppc64le

Error when doing HDB start:  process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running

When looking at the daemon logs, I see this:

[21152]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-15 11:11:51.364509 i Daemon DaemonHandle.cpp(00340) : Process 'hdbnameserver', pid 21174 exited because it caught signal 11 with core
[21152]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-15 11:11:51.364542 i Daemon DaemonHandle.cpp(00367) : Program 'hdbnameserver' failed during startup. Service is essential, shutting down all instances

I could not find much on the web when searching for this error. Is there any library that I need to manually install/update using zypper?

More info on system:

sh-4.4$ ./HDB version
HDB version info:
version: 2.00.059.04.1655794895
branch: fa/hana2sp05
machine config: linuxppc64le
git hash: 1cdbd35ec7472ab5d22a0bac02725a02dc3038f9
git merge time: 2022-06-21 09:01:35
weekstone: 0000.00.0
cloud edition: 0000.00.00
compile date: 2022-06-21 09:10:03
compile host: lsh35280le
compile type: rel

OS Info using: uname -a
Linux p10sles025 6.4.0-150600.23.25-default #1 SMP Tue Oct 1 10:54:01 UTC 2024 (ea7c56d) ppc64le ppc64le ppc64le GNU/Linux

Thanks in advance for any pointers!

entry.title: converting SQL query to Hana
entry.content:
Hi experts ,i We have Migrated Our SAP B1 SQL DB TO SAP HANA and i want someone to help me in Writing the following query to HANA SQL :

/* SELECT FROM [dbo].[OITM] T0 */
DECLARE @ToItm AS nvarchar(20)
/* WHERE */
SET @ToItm= /* T0.ItemCode */ '[%0]'
DECLARE @Icode AS nvarchar(20)
DECLARE @Wcode AS nvarchar(20)
SET @Icode = $[INV1.ItemCode]
SET @Wcode = $[INV1.WhsCode]

IF @Icode IN (SELECT ItemCode FROM OBTN)
Begin
(
SELECT T0.ItemName 'اسم الصنف',T0.ItemCode 'كود الصنف',
T0.WhsCode 'المستودع' ,T0.BatchNumber 'رقم الدفعة', T0.Quantity 'الكمية'
FROM IBatchStock T0
WHERE T0.WhsCode = @Wcode
)
END
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=0
Begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + @ToItm + '%' and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
End
If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=2
begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,1,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1,(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1))-CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1) +1),len(@ToItm)-(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1) +1) +1 ) + '%'
and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
end
If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=1
Begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,1,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1,(Len(@ToItm)-CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1) +1) ) + '%'
and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
End

entry.title: SAP HANA hdbindexserver can not start : Missing log ...
entry.content:
Hello

I can not start SAP Hana hdbindexserver, when i view indexserver_xxxx.30003.042.trc i found error : "Missing log, recovery stopped at log pos 0x4b311dac2"

[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.339522 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(04916) : replay(): isPri: 0, hReplay: 0, vid: 3,isInTakeover(): 0, no handle
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.339530 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(06793) : Preparing log recovery handler, restart redo log position 0x4b311dac2
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.339819 i Logger LoggerImpl.cpp(00464) : Initial Logger Guids: persistenceGUID=1e5af3fe-e464-20201106-040925-2760000005, lastRestoreGUID=00000000-0000-19720306-084436-2e00000000
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.339912 i Logger LoggerStatistics.cpp(00397) : Setting log segment backup timeout to 900s, original value was 0s
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.339927 i Logger LoggerImpl.cpp(00544) : Initial Log Retention: Off
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.377001 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02741) : BACKUP DATA seems to have been executed, database should be recoverable from backup
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.377011 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02897) : Deactivating REDO logging for log replay
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.377012 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02908) : Start termination of rollback(s) open in restart/backup savepoint
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.397378 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02916) : Termination of rollback(s) open in restart/backup savepoint finished in 2e-06 seconds;
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.397392 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02995) : Start garbage collection of history files, maximum 40 threads, cleanup files to process: 49651, raw size of cleanup: 203370496 bytes, biggest cleanup file= 4096 bytes
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.397396 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02996) : Start LIVECACHE garbage collection of history files, 40 threads, cleanup files to process: 0, raw size of cleanup: 0 bytes, biggest cleanup file= 0 bytes
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.401391 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(03029) : No TransactionManager associated, set HistoryManager minReadTS to MAX for immediate GC
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.401401 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(03038) : Garbage collection of LIVECACHE history files finished in 0.003999 seconds;
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.401409 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(02938) : Expecting savepoint 413295 log record as first log record at 0x4b311dac2
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.401997 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01007) : RecoveryQueueCount used: 40
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418161 i Logger PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp(03141) : Starting log replay at position 0x4b311dac2
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418172 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01822) : Triggering recovery of remaining log
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418185 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01136) : Notify RedoHandler listener about new state: 0
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418188 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01156) : Notification of RedoHandler listener finished
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418189 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01886) : Finishing log recovery, waiting for in-process and in-load segments
[16558]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418242 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(02449) : Log recovery cannot expect any more data at position 0x4b311dac2, load states:
- LogPartition[/hana/log/BAV/mnt00001/hdb00003.00003/:0]: #segments 0/0 processed, 0/0 loaded, 0 total
[16558]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418255 e Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(02627) : Missing log, cannot recover starting from 0x4b311dac2, restart pos 0x4b311db00
[16558]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418358 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(04195) : Signaling finish wait barrier
[16558]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418366 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(02746) : Aligning log end 0x4b311dac2 to 0x4b311db00
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418367 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01889) : Finish wait barrier signaled
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418451 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01917) : Wait for recovery queue threads
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418832 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(01925) : Recovery finished at log position 0x4b311dac2
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418843 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01136) : Notify RedoHandler listener about new state: 1
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.418845 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01156) : Notification of RedoHandler listener finished
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463637 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01136) : Notify RedoHandler listener about new state: 2
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463647 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01156) : Notification of RedoHandler listener finished
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463648 i Logger RecoveryHandlerImpl.cpp(02195) : Termination of 0 indoubt transactions was executed in 0.002914 seconds; 0 remaining sessions.
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463841 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01178) : aborting log replay ...
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463846 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01136) : Notify RedoHandler listener about new state: 3
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463847 i PersistenceManag PersistenceManagerSPI.cpp(01156) : Notification of RedoHandler listener finished
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.463898 f PersistenceLayer PersistenceController.cpp(00736) : startup failed exception 1: no.3000280 (DataAccess/impl/PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:3198) TID: 16328
Missing log, recovery stopped at log pos 0x4b311dac2
exception throw location:
1: 0x00007ff4a62a3a4e in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::replayOrClearLog(bool, bool, bool, unsigned long&, unsigned long&)+0x65a at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:3198 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
2: 0x00007ff4a629c00c in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::replayImpl(bool)+0x178 at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:4974 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
3: 0x00007ff4a8679f9e in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceSystem::start(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo const&, bool, bool)+0xa8a at PersistenceSystem.cpp:566 (libhdbpersistence.so)
4: 0x00007ff4a8633d7e in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceFactory::startPersistence(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, ltt::smartptr_handle<DataAccess::DisasterRecoveryPrimaryCallback>, DataAccess::DisasterRecoveryESCallback*)+0xba at PersistenceFactory.cpp:546 (libhdbpersistence.so)
5: 0x00007ff4c59b16b9 in PersistenceController::startup(PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo*, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, DataAccess::TablePreloadReadCallback*, Backup::RecoverCbc_Federation*)+0x5d5 at PersistenceController.cpp:679 (libhdblogger.so)
6: 0x0000563be7d79381 in TRexAPI::TREXIndexServer::assign(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError&)+0x7a0 at TREXIndexServer.cpp:1236 (hdbindexserver)
7: 0x0000563be7d82a29 in TRexAPI::AssignThread::run(void*)+0x35 at TREXIndexServer.cpp:533 (hdbindexserver)
8: 0x00007ff4a7e0ad8b in TrexThreads::PoolThread::run()+0x787 at PoolThread.cpp:462 (libhdbbasement.so)
9: 0x00007ff4a7e0d850 in TrexThreads::PoolThread::run(void*&)+0x10 at PoolThread.cpp:143 (libhdbbasement.so)
10: 0x00007ff4a2ea24e8 in Execution::Thread::staticMainImp(Execution::Thread*)+0x534 at Thread.cpp:529 (libhdbbasis.so)
11: 0x00007ff4a2e91798 in Execution::pthreadFunctionWrapper(Execution::Thread*)+0x164 at ThreadInterposition.cpp:633 (libhdbbasis.so)
12: 0x00007ff4a26244f9 in start_thread+0xd5 (libpthread.so.0)
13: 0x00007ff4a0e1bfbf in __GI___clone+0x3b (libc.so.6)
exception type information:
- 0: public ltt::exception@0x7ff4a2588960
[16328]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:14.468552 e assign TREXIndexServer.cpp(01264) : assign failed with persistence startup error. exception 1: no.3000280 (DataAccess/impl/PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:3198) TID: 16328
Missing log, recovery stopped at log pos 0x4b311dac2
exception throw location:
1: 0x00007ff4a62a3a4e in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::replayOrClearLog(bool, bool, bool, unsigned long&, unsigned long&)+0x65a at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:3198 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
2: 0x00007ff4a629c00c in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::replayImpl(bool)+0x178 at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:4974 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
3: 0x00007ff4a8679f9e in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceSystem::start(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo const&, bool, bool)+0xa8a at PersistenceSystem.cpp:566 (libhdbpersistence.so)
4: 0x00007ff4a8633d7e in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceFactory::startPersistence(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, ltt::smartptr_handle<DataAccess::DisasterRecoveryPrimaryCallback>, DataAccess::DisasterRecoveryESCallback*)+0xba at PersistenceFactory.cpp:546 (libhdbpersistence.so)
5: 0x00007ff4c59b16b9 in PersistenceController::startup(PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo*, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, DataAccess::TablePreloadReadCallback*, Backup::RecoverCbc_Federation*)+0x5d5 at PersistenceController.cpp:679 (libhdblogger.so)
6: 0x0000563be7d79381 in TRexAPI::TREXIndexServer::assign(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError&)+0x7a0 at TREXIndexServer.cpp:1236 (hdbindexserver)
7: 0x0000563be7d82a29 in TRexAPI::AssignThread::run(void*)+0x35 at TREXIndexServer.cpp:533 (hdbindexserver)
8: 0x00007ff4a7e0ad8b in TrexThreads::PoolThread::run()+0x787 at PoolThread.cpp:462 (libhdbbasement.so)
9: 0x00007ff4a7e0d850 in TrexThreads::PoolThread::run(void*&)+0x10 at PoolThread.cpp:143 (libhdbbasement.so)
10: 0x00007ff4a2ea24e8 in Execution::Thread::staticMainImp(Execution::Thread*)+0x534 at Thread.cpp:529 (libhdbbasis.so)
11: 0x00007ff4a2e91798 in Execution::pthreadFunctionWrapper(Execution::Thread*)+0x164 at ThreadInterposition.cpp:633 (libhdbbasis.so)
12: 0x00007ff4a26244f9 in start_thread+0xd5 (libpthread.so.0)
13: 0x00007ff4a0e1bfbf in __GI___clone+0x3b (libc.so.6)
exception type information:
- 0: public ltt::exception@0x7ff4a2588960
stopping service...
[16195]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:15.112254 i Service_Shutdown TrexService.cpp(00582) : Preparing for shutting service down
[16505]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:15.112298 i Service_Shutdown TREXIndexServer.cpp(02592) : Stopping data backup
[16505]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-10-17 00:44:15.112509 i Service_Shutdown TREXIndexServer.cpp(02597) : preparing auditing shutdown

I don't have any new backup of database. Is there anyway to start my database? Please help me.

Thanks in advance

Binh.

entry.title: How can I parallelize the training of a HANA_ML MLPRegressor?
entry.content:
According to the documentation setting thread_ratio=1 means all available threads on SAP HANA will be used for training, but I can only see 5 threads of the scriptserver being active. This is exactly the same behavior as when training with the default value of thread_ratio=0. How can I speed up the training via parallelization?

from hana_ml.algorithms.pal.neural_network import MLPRegressor

mlp = MLPRegressor(hidden_layer_size=(layer1,layer2),
activation='relu',
output_activation='relu',
max_iter=iterations,
weight_init='normal',
training_style='batch',
normalization='z-transform',
thread_ratio=1)

mlp.fit(train_df, features=x_columns, label='y')

entry.title: Error in hdblcm while adding the first worker host to a SAP HANA system on Google Cloud
entry.content:
Adding a worker host with hdblcm to a SAP HANA system on Google Cloud is failing.
The primary host is 'hana-mh-a', the worker host to be added is 'hana-mh-aw1'. It is the first and only worker.

This is the error in the hdblcm log (more of the log further below):

Cannot verify password: sapstartsrv of host 'hana-mh-a' is not running
Cannot establish HTTPS connection to 'hana-mh-a': Net::HTTPS: connect: timeout

However, on the primary, I can see that sapstartsrv is indeed running:

[root@hana-mh-a ~]# ps auwx | grep sapstartsrv
sapadm 97216 0.0 0.0 708680 78900 ? Ssl 05:29 0:19 /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/sapstartsrv pf=/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile -D
mh1adm 145567 0.0 0.0 434136 57876 ? Ssl 08:36 0:00 /usr/sap/MH1/HDB50/exe/sapstartsrv pf=/usr/sap/MH1/SYS/profile/MH1_HDB50_hana-mh-a

I also tried starting and stopping sapstartsrv, both the database and the hostctrl instances:

sapcontrol -nr 50 -function StopService MH1
sapcontrol -nr 50 -function StartService MH1
service saphostagent.service restart

Key exchange between the servers has been successful:

[root@hana-mh-a ~]# cat ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
ssh-rsa AA...ws= root@hana-mh-a
ssh-rsa AA...ws= root@hana-mh-a
ssh-rsa AA...nk= root@hana-mh-aw1

[root@hana-mh-aw1 ~]# cat ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
ssh-rsa AA...nk= root@hana-mh-aw1
ssh-rsa AA...nk= root@hana-mh-aw1
# Added by Google
ssh-rsa AA...ws= root@hana-mh-a

On the primary, this is the hdblcm command that is failing:

cat passwd.xml | ./hdblcm --action=add_hosts --addhosts="hana-mh-aw1" --root_user=root --listen_interface=global --read_password_from_stdin=xml -b

The system was set up with Google Cloud's Terraform script. The passwords in passwd.xml are those provided to the Terraform script and have independently been validated on the primary.

Why would the error be with an HTTPS connection to the primary given that I am running the hdblcm command from the primary? Is this message originating from a script being run from the worker?
Any advice for what could be going wrong and how to fix it?

More of the hdblcm error log:

INFO: Starting external program /hana/shared/MH1/global/hdb/install/bin/hdbmodify
INFO: Command line is: /hana/shared/MH1/global/hdb/install/bin/hdbmodify -b --read_password_from_stdin=xml --instlog_dir=/var/tmp/hdb_MH1_hdblcm_add_hosts_2024-10-21_08.06.25 --nostart=off --skip_modify_sudoers=off --sid=MH1 --sapmnt=/hana/shared --install_hostagent=on --auto_initialize_services=on --root_user=root --addhosts=hana-mh-aw1:role=worker:group=default --remote_execution=ssh --use_non_shared_storage=true
INFO: Output line 1:
INFO: Output line 2:
INFO: Output line 3: SAP HANA Lifecycle Management - hdbmodify_addhosts 2.7.72
INFO: Output line 4: **********************************************************
INFO: Output line 5:
INFO: Output line 6:
INFO: Output line 7: System Properties:
INFO: Output line 8: MH1 /hana/shared/MH1 HDB_ALONE
INFO: Output line 9: HDB50
INFO: Output line 10: version: 2.00.079.0
INFO: Output line 11: host: hana-mh-a (Database Worker (worker))
INFO: Output line 12: edition: SAP HANA Database
INFO: Output line 13:
INFO: Output line 14: Start reading from input channel...
INFO: Output line 15: ... Done.
INFO: Output line 16: Modifying configuration of SAP HANA System 'MH1'...
INFO: Output line 17:
INFO: Output line 18: Summary before execution:
INFO: Output line 19: Installation Path: /hana/shared
INFO: Output line 20: SAP HANA System ID: MH1
INFO: Output line 21: Additional Hosts: hana-mh-aw1:role=worker:group=default
INFO: Output line 22: Enable the installation or upgrade of the SAP Host Agent: Yes
INFO: Output line 23: Remote Execution: ssh
INFO: Output line 24: Root User Name For Remote Hosts: root
INFO: Output line 25:
INFO: Output line 26: Adding additional host...
INFO: Output line 27: Adding host 'hana-mh-aw1'...
INFO: Output line 28: hana-mh-aw1: Running in batch mode
INFO: Output line 29: Reconfiguring SAP HANA system failed!
INFO: Output line 30: Add hosts:
INFO: Output line 31: Creating a multiple host system failed
INFO: Output line 32: Adding host 'hana-mh-aw1' failed!
INFO: Output line 33: Add host failed
INFO: Output line 34: Running in batch mode
INFO: Output line 35: Cannot verify password: sapstartsrv of host 'hana-mh-a' is not running
INFO: Output line 36: Cannot establish HTTPS connection to 'hana-mh-a': Net::HTTPS: connect: timeout

entry.title: How to trace log change when using SE16n
entry.content:
Dear all,

My user ( IT department ) using se16n to change data in table VBRP.

Please tell me the way trace the log change information ( the user, date time, value old and value new ...)

Thank you so much!!

entry.title: Nodejs is outdated for version 6 & 8 in XSA
entry.content:
Hello Support,

 

Our monitoring has detected the node.js is out of date and need to be updated. Could you please share with us on how can we update the node.js?

 

Or can we remove it for the older version since there is recent nodejs?

 

Cheers,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Extend mass customers to a new company code and sales area in SAP S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Currently I'm working on one rollout (SAP S4 Hana) project where I created a new company code, so for that I have a total 3500 customers, and all of those customers I want to extend to the new company code and sales area. 

So for that, I need a solution. Can anyone tell me in detail how I can extend all these customers to one company code and sales area. 

Thanks and Regards
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: How to tackle Quality Issues after UD?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus!

The scenario is such that, the business is using sampling procedure in inspection lot. Take the below case for example:

The GR is of 100 Qty (Incoming inspection with percentage sample 10%.) 

Inspection lot triggered for the GR will be of 10 Qty as per sampling procedure.

The inspection lot was checked and UD was "Accepted".

Later when the stock was moved to the production line (50 Qty) there were some rejections (This can be mapped with Production GR inspection)

Later the quality team decides to do a recheck of the remaining 50 Qty and found that there are more rejections.

 

How to handle this?

I guess the team can create Manual Inspection Lot for the 50 qty and check it. If there are any issues a quality notification can be triggered and team can block the stock there.

Is there any better approach? Since business will recover the rejections (melt it in furnace) and re-use it.

I am new to SAP QM, would appriciate your input on this.

entry.title: Schedule a job through SM36 for a Custom Layout
entry.content:
I need to schedule a job through SM36 for a custom layout that includes the material number and quantity columns in the VA05 report. However, with multiple layouts available, I can't set a default layout. 

In SM36, I can enter the program (SD_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW) and select a selection variant for the program, but there is no option to select a layout variant.

I've searched for a solution but haven't been able to find one.

entry.title: issue UOM is M2 and base UOM is PC. When converting PR To PO error of UOM
entry.content:
Hi Pl help,

The item's issue UOM is M2 (since it's part of the BOM), and the base UOM is PC. When converting PR to PO, it auto-converts to M2, even though PR shows it as PC. How can we ensure that PO also remains in PC?

#SAP#SAPP#SAPMM#MM#PP

entry.title: MB90 is not generating SP02 Spool but Fiori app is able to generate spool for same Material document
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am trying to execute the GUI Transaction Code MB90 , with a material document and output type as WF02. I am able to execute and process it after which processing gives success message and turns green. But SP02 log is not generated for the same. I tried to execute the Fiori counterpart for this TCODE Output material Document (MB90) it is working fine and generating spool.

The GUI is behaving correctly for output WE02 as we checked. And we have used a SAPSCRIPT here.

I debugged the program, but the whole process is same, and the parameters are getting filled as well. NACE Configure is also in place.

Can you please help me here what can be the cause.

Thanks ,

SAPUSER

entry.title: Liquibase 4.29.2 Fails to Update HANA
entry.content:
This is my code which works with liquibase-core 4.14.0 but not with 4.29.2. Because of vulnerabilities in dependencies of liquibase-core I’ve upgraded liquibase-core and liquibase-hanadb to 4.29.2. I have also upgraded the ngdbc to 2.21.11.

pom.xml:

 

<dependency>
  <groupId>com.sap.cloud.db.jdbc</groupId>
  <artifactId>ngdbc</artifactId>
  <version>2.21.11</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.liquibase</groupId>
  <artifactId>liquibase-core</artifactId>
  <version>4.29.2</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.liquibase.ext</groupId>
  <artifactId>liquibase-hanadb</artifactId>
  <version>4.29.2</version>
</dependency>

 

Relevant Code:

 

HanaDatabase hdb = new HanaDatabase();
hdb.setConnection(new JdbcConnection(connection));
hdb.setDefaultSchemaName(db.getName());
Liquibase liquibase = new liquibase.Liquibase(path, new ClassLoaderResourceAccessor(), hdb);
liquibase.update(new Contexts(), new LabelExpression());
liquibase.close();

 

It now fails on the liquibase.update line with the error message:

 

hana is not a supported DB

 

 I have looked into using the CommandScope as outlined here but have had no luck: https://contribute.liquibase.com/extensions-integrations/integration-guides/calling-commands/

The vulnerability exists in liquibase-core up to and including 4.20.0. Any version after 4.20.0 and I get the above issue. Does have Java code working to update HANA with liquibase 4.29.2?

entry.title: Multiple Email notifications
entry.content:
I have a sap ariba account with email notifications enabled. Recently I have been facing an issue with the number of emails received. The same email is being sent to my account multiple times within the same minute.
It's not an email delivery issue, and it only occurs with my user (admin account) - the other users set to receive email notifications do not have this issue.

entry.title: HANA SQL to give a BPC user name and get the dimension members that they can access
entry.content:
Hi, all.

I need a HANA SQL code which I input a user name and a secured dimension name for BPC and it returns the list of dimension members that the given user can access.

I have tried join with tables USR02, AGR_USERS, UJE_PROFILE_AGR, but I didn't get success yet.

Who can help me?
Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: SAP HANA Rep task - structure change in source table without Reconcile option
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

When we have a change to source table structure, we usually have to use the Reconcile Changes option in the rep task. Otherwise, the replication breaks. 

In replication behavior options, I do find the option - initial + realtime with structure. 

Does it help in accommodating structure changes in the rep task? 

Best Regards,

Sharath

entry.title: HANA on-premise - Memory error with SELECT COUNT(*) on Calculation View
entry.content:
On Hana2 sp7 we have some large calculation wiews on which it is impossible to execute the count of record like: select count(*) from ‘view name’ because the select ends in memory error with the message (over 300gb of memory consumed which is the current limit of available memory in hana):

Cannot allocate enough memory: search table error: cannot allocate enough memory: [9] Memory allocation failed;exception 1000002: Allocation failed ; $failure_type$=STATEMENT_MEMORY_LIMIT_FROM_GLOBAL_CONFIG

The same error obviously also occurs with the data preview.

The number of records in one of these views is 270 million so not excessive and the model is built on a base table (not partitioned) with these characteristics:

The strange think is that if the select is more complex, for example inserting a group by year like: select count(*),year from ‘view name’ group by year, it works correctly and consumes few memory (30 gb). The same if we add a where to the select(*) on the id field (which is the 'key' field of the view and is never 'null') like: select count(*) from ‘view_name’ where id is not null.

The view's data model has already been optimized and there is nothing more that can be done about it, we also tried to apply different HINTs to the calc. view but without success.

Do you have any ideas on possible causes and any suggestions?

Thanks

Regards

Luca

entry.title: Need help to install ABAP Development Tools plugin in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am unable to install the # ABAP Development Tools ADT plugin in Eclipse and getting the below error. I am using the most recent version of Eclipse 2024-09 on my computer.

Error: 

Cannot complete the install because one or more required items could not be found.

  Software being installed: ABAP Core Development Tools 2.83.1 (com.sap.adt.core.feature.group 2.83.1)

  Missing requirement: samc Model 1.15.0 (com.sap.adt.conn.amc.ui 1.15.0) requires 'osgi.bundle; org.eclipse.emf.transaction [1.9.0,2.0.0)' but it could not be found

  Cannot satisfy dependency: From: ABAP Connectivity 1.15.0 (com.sap.adt.conn.feature.group 1.15.0)

    To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.conn.amc.ui [1.15.0,1.15.0]

I followed multiple posts but could not figure out the issue.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/installation-eclipse-and-configuration-adt-tool/ba-p/13560273

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/eclipse-errors-after-installing-adt-tools/qaq-p/13635606/comment-id/4821618#M4821618

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/sap-abap-development-tools-error/td-p/12755746

My deliverables are delayed due to this issue.

Could anyone please help me to fix this issue?

Thanks in advance,

Shehzad

entry.title: Very less space released after performing the De-fragmentation in HANA DB of *** system
entry.content:
We had performed Disk Defragmentation in PERSON_NAME DB of *** system.
But very less space was released even after running the fragmentation overhead to 105%.

help to reduce the fragmentation and get the unused space released.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
